name: James & Jo Ann's Christmas Tree Spritz
recipeInstructions:
Pre-heat oven to 425°F.
Combine salt and flour together.
Cream sugar with butter and Crisco. Add lemon extract and food coloring.
Add egg and blend well.
Add dry ingredients a little at a time.
Chill for about an hour if dough is too soft. Fill cookie shooter according to directions.
Press out shapes as desired and decorate with colored sugar, etc.
Bake one sheet at a time for 8 - 10 minutes. Cookies should be slightly browned. Remove carefully and cool on rack.
This recipe can be doubled.
